message:
test(serve): batch 10+11 handler branch tests (JWKS, WS, audit, checkpoint, pane)

Add tests for: handleWS (3 branches), handleRobotHealth POST, fetchJWKSKeys
(5 cases), jwksCache getKey (4 cases), parseRSAPublicKey (3 cases),
handleContextBuildV1 (2 cases), checkWSOrigin (4 branches), AuditStore
record/query, handleExportCheckpoint format validation + POST bad JSON + zip
format, handleSetPaneTitleV1 bad JSON, handleStartPaneStreamV1 +
handleStopPaneStreamV1 empty session.

Coverage: handleWS 0%→100%, handleRobotHealth 50%→100%, getKey 54→96%,
fetchJWKSKeys 67→88%, parseRSAPublicKey →100%, handleContextBuildV1 40→90%,
handleStartPaneStreamV1 73→87%, handleStopPaneStreamV1 69→85%,
handleExportCheckpoint 35→37%. Overall: 71.2%→71.9%.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
